purpose.title: 1. Purpose
purpose.text: These terms govern participation in classes of the Feldenkrais Method offered by the provider.

serviceNature.title: 2. Nature of the service
serviceNature.text1: The classes are educational and wellness-oriented.
serviceNature.text2: They do not constitute medical treatment and do not replace professional healthcare.

participation.title: 3. Participation formats
participation.text: Specific conditions (price, duration, number of sessions) will be communicated in advance.

registration.title: 4. Registration
registration.text1: Participation in the classes requires prior registration and confirmation by the provider.
registration.text2: Registration or participation in the classes implies acceptance of these Terms and Conditions.
registration.text3: Participation of minors requires authorization from their parents or legal guardians.

payment.title: 5. Payment method
payment.text1: Payment is made in person or via bank transfer, as agreed in advance.
payment.text2: No payments are made through the website.

cancellations.title: 6. Cancellations and changes
cancellations.text1: Cancellation and rescheduling conditions will be communicated in advance and may be adapted individually.
cancellations.text2: In case of non-attendance without prior notice, the session may be considered used within a package or pass.
cancellations.text3: The provider reserves the right to cancel or reschedule a class for justified reasons, offering an alternative or compensation.

passesValidity.title: 7. Validity of passes
passesValidity.text: The validity period of packages or passes will be communicated at the time of purchase and will not be indefinite.

participantResponsibility.title: 8. Participant responsibility
items: they are in adequate physical condition to participate
they will inform the provider of any relevant condition (injuries, health issues, etc.)

liability.title: 9. Liability
liability.text: The provider is not responsible for possible injuries resulting from improper use of the instructions or failure to disclose relevant information by the participant.

modifications.title: 10. Modifications
modifications.text: The provider reserves the right to modify schedules, conditions, or prices, informing participants in advance.

applicableLaw.title: 11. Applicable law
applicableLaw.text: These terms are governed by Spanish law.

dataProtection.title: 12. Data protection
dataProtection.text: Personal data will be processed in accordance with the website’s Privacy Policy.
